posts.author: Crucible
posts.title: The SCOTUS ruling is about what a President can and cannot do, setting precedent for all presidents, not just Trump. Congress and SCOTUS have been trying to weaken the executive branch for at least 100 years. It's the only branch with term limited elections.

posts.title: WATCH: “I Don’t Think the Court Meant That, but It’s the Way It is” – Trump Says SCOTUS Actually Reaffirmed Tariff Powers, Announces 10% GLOBAL Tariffs and Investigation into Unfair Trading Practices of Other Countries and Companies

link_metadata.description: President Trump on Friday told reporters that he will impose new “global” tariffs on foreign imports of 10% following the Supreme Court’s ruling against his authority to impose the tariffs under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA).
